scope_rationale.decision_information: Test whether real aggressor-side prints support mechanism classes that OHLC shadows cannot identify, while retaining at least USD 30 under the persistent Databento hard cap.
scope_rationale.why_two_months: One month costs USD 15.5472625494 and three months costs USD 60.161034822464; two months is the largest observed bounded pair request below both the D1 cap and the USD 30 reserve constraint.

economic_hypothesis_classes.who_pays: Urgent informed or mandate-driven aggressors that split a larger parent order across successive prints.
economic_hypothesis_classes.hypothesis: An aggressor-side volume shock accompanied by efficient price displacement persists over the next event bars because the parent order is not completed in one print burst.

economic_hypothesis_classes.who_pays: Aggressive late entrants whose market orders are absorbed by resting liquidity without commensurate price progress.
economic_hypothesis_classes.hypothesis: Extreme signed traded volume with abnormally small price displacement marks absorption and reverses after the aggressive flow exhausts.

economic_hypothesis_classes.who_pays: Urgent liquidity takers that sweep several price levels and must continue executing after a genuine high-quality burst.
economic_hypothesis_classes.hypothesis: A clustered burst of same-side prints is predictive only when price follows the signed volume efficiently; low-follow-through bursts are not continuation signals.

economic_hypothesis_classes.who_pays: Participants entering after the cash open while inherited pre-open aggressor inventory is still being transferred.
economic_hypothesis_classes.hypothesis: A change in signed aggression between pre-open and cash-session event bars reveals an inventory handoff whose direction persists until the new session reaches balance.

CONTRE: Two development months can expose print-level mechanisms and generate many events, but they are too short to establish seasonal stability; any survivor still requires purged multiplicity-adjusted evidence and untouched forward confirmation.
